title: arabis hirsuta subsp. balansae
intro: Arabis hirsuta subsp. balansae is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as rock cress. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and antiseptic, which makes it effective in treating urinary tract infections and skin conditions. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including kidney stones, cystitis, and eczema, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Arabis hirsuta subsp. balansae can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
